channel.title: vscode on sud0suw
channel.description: Recent content in vscode on sud0suw

item.title: Debug IDA Pro plugins
item.description: Table of Contents Requirements Overview Setup Create IDA python plugin to enable debugging Configure vscode Start Debugging! Resources Requirements IDA Pro 7.4+ (with python) Visual Studio Code (debugger IDE) ptvsd Overview If vscode is your go to IDE for everything python, then you’re probably aware of the module ptvsd. It enables debugging python scripts being run on another process by attaching to the Visual Studio debug server.
